description: SPIRAL environment variable schema — living documentation of all configuration surface

vars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
vars.description: Anthropic API key used by Claude CLI workers to make LLM calls

vars.name: SPIRAL_PYTHON
vars.description: Python interpreter to use for all SPIRAL Python scripts

vars.name: SPIRAL_VALIDATE_CMD
vars.description: Command run in Phase V to validate story implementations

vars.name: SPIRAL_MODEL_ROUTING
vars.description: Model escalation policy: auto (haiku→sonnet→opus), fixed:<model>, or off

vars.name: SPIRAL_RESEARCH_MODEL
vars.description: Claude model used in Phase R research synthesis

vars.name: SPIRAL_MAX_PENDING
vars.description: Max pending stories allowed in prd.json (0 = unlimited)

vars.name: SPIRAL_STORY_BATCH_SIZE
vars.description: Max stories shown in status output (0 = show all)

vars.name: SPIRAL_COST_CEILING
vars.description: USD spend cap per run (empty = disabled). Example: 10.00

vars.name: SPIRAL_IMPL_TIMEOUT
vars.description: Seconds before a Phase I ralph worker is killed (0 = unlimited)

vars.name: SPIRAL_VALIDATE_TIMEOUT
vars.description: Seconds before Phase V validation is killed (0 = unlimited)

vars.name: SPIRAL_RESEARCH_TIMEOUT
vars.description: Seconds before Phase R LLM call is killed (0 = unlimited)

vars.name: SPIRAL_MEMORY_LIMIT
vars.description: V8 heap size in MB for Claude CLI workers

vars.name: SPIRAL_LOW_POWER_MODE
vars.description: Enable memory-pressure-aware worker throttling (0=off, 1=on)

vars.name: SPIRAL_LOG_LEVEL
vars.description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, or ERROR

vars.name: SPIRAL_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK
vars.description: HTTPS URL to POST phase lifecycle events (empty = disabled)

vars.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT
vars.description: OpenTelemetry OTLP collector endpoint (empty = OTel disabled)

vars.name: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY
vars.description: Firecrawl API key (required only when SPIRAL_FIRECRAWL_ENABLED=1)

vars.name: SPIRAL_FIRECRAWL_ENABLED
vars.description: Enable Firecrawl for Phase R web crawling (0=off, 1=on)

vars.name: SPIRAL_CREATE_PRS
vars.description: Push story commits and open GitHub PRs after each story pass

vars.name: SPIRAL_AUTO_INFER_DEPS
vars.description: Auto-infer story dependency edges and write to prd.json after Phase M

vars.name: SPIRAL_DEV_URL
vars.description: Dev server URL for Phase V screenshots (empty = screenshots disabled)

vars.name: SPIRAL_GIT_AUTHOR
vars.description: Fallback git identity when git config user.name/email is absent (format: Name <email>)

vars.name: SPIRAL_SKIP_STORY_IDS
vars.description: Comma-separated story IDs to permanently skip (e.g. US-001,US-002)

vars.name: SPIRAL_PROM_PORT
vars.description: Port for Prometheus metrics scrape endpoint (empty = disabled)
